# merge-repos-from-zip
Description: Merge two or more repositories into a single project by zipping and uploading them for processing.
Source: project
1. Locate the repositories you wish to combine.
2. Compress each repository into a separate `.zip` file.
3. Upload all `.zip` files to the chat.
4. Provide any additional context or instructions for the merge, such as the desired final structure or specific functionalities to integrate.
